prompts: /plan "in the plugin app, when we form fill the facebook draft there are some issues. The price is not coming across properly, We have a price of '$3,350/Monthly' that was converted to '34'. The heating, pets, parking, ac, and laundry are not getting filled out. Check our mapping from our listing, some of that data should be in the building object, which may have a 'parking' section: { "parking": { "parkingType": "Other" }}. Also check for the 'interiorFeatures' object if it exists it may have some good things to map. ALSO, super important for the AI description generation, IF we have not specifically included something like heating and ac, or parking in the description or listing details, DO NOT add features, or items that don't exist, its ok to simply skip them."
when mapping the 'Parking type' if the property listing has 'parkingType': "other" than the form fill is 'Parking available'
if the original property description indicates that the property is 'pet friendly' we can set both the 'Cat friendly' and 'Dog friendly' to true.
If the listing has a  heating type of forced air then we set the form field 'Central heating'
Update are facebook mapping object we pass to the facebook script to include the new data

'in-suite laundry' or 'in-unit laundry' in the description should map to 'Laundry type' of 'In-unit laundry'. 'parkade parking' or 'guest parking' should map to 'Parking type' of 'Parking available' unless we already have a 'Parking type' of 'Garage parking' set which overrides the other types of parking.

if the description has 'indoor parking' or the listing "parkingType" contains "Attached Garage" then we set the form file for 'Parking type' to 'Garage parking'. If the description contains 'in-unit laundry' then we set the 'Laundry type' form fill to 'In-unit laundry'. For some reason, our AI description form fill in filling in with the heating, or laundry or garage values in the facebook form fill. The data available shoud be set to todays date as as string like "Jan 21, 2026"

Our AI description form fill for facebook is getting overwritten with 'In-unit laundry', 'Laundry type' is not getting set. The 'Property square feet' is not getting form filled when we can see the we found 2 measurements for the listing details: squareFootage: "700 sqft",
totalFinishedArea:
"700 sqft"
